steps.t: Rothog the Storm has escorted you from Hármelak's manor. He clearly believes his task is finished.
Hármelak told you that every day Azagath's servants can be found on the docks by the Harbour Warden's tower, filling bowls with water to carry to the …
Azagath's water-bearers are on a dock by the Harbour Warden's tower.
Azagath's water-bearers are on a dock by the Harbour Warden's tower.
The water-bearers will only allow you to accompany them into the Citadel if you can prove up to their task.
Azagath's water-bearers are on the dock beside the Harbour Warden's tower.
